name: Disseminate
short_description: This game immerses players in an anime-styled world where they take on the role of a male protagonist dressed in a suit uniform, exploring around residential areas.
detailed_description:
This game immerses players in an anime style world, where they take on the role of a male protagonist dressed in a suit and explore around residential areas. Players use the ASDW key to move and the spacebar to jump, helping heroes overcome various obstacles.

The task is to find six hidden gems scattered throughout the environment. Every discovered gemstone brings players a sense of achievement. The game features beautiful visual effects and vibrant colors, with intricate details in every scene from gardens to alleys, making every area full of the joy of discovery. The gameplay is light and cheerful, creating a mysterious and comfortable atmosphere for exploration.

This is not only an adventure to find gems, but also a pleasant visual experience.

Gameplay

Find six gems

Game operation mode

Mobile=wasd

Jump=space
